sections.paragraph:
- Original: φθέγγομαι

- Transliteration: Phtheggomai

- Phonetic: ftheng'-gom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to give out a sound, noise or cry

a. of any sort of sound or voice, whether of man or of animal or inanimate object as thunder, musical instruments, etc.

- Origin: probably akin to G5338 and thus to G5346

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Probably akin to G5338 and thus to G5346; to utter a clear sound that is (genitive case) to proclaim: - speak.
